subtask_summary.notes: UserSummaryDTO, PharmacySummaryDTO, DashboardStatsDTO implemented as Java records. PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO implemented as a regular class with @NotNull on Boolean active field.

AdminActionEvent extends ApplicationEvent; constructor calls super(source). AuditLogListener uses @EventListener + @Async with a try/catch to prevent async exception swallowing. @EnableAsync already on main class.
NotificationFactory is a utility class with private constructor. Null guards added for recipient and message. Factory correctly delegates to EmailNotification or SmsNotification.

findings.description: AuditLogListener @Async methods can silently swallow exceptions by default if no AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler is configured. This would cause missed audit log entries with no visible error.
findings.resolution: Wrapped the body of handle() in a try/catch that logs at ERROR level. This ensures failures are visible in logs even if not re-thrown.
findings.lesson_learned: Always wrap @Async method bodies in try/catch or register an AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler bean to surface async failures.

findings.description: NotificationFactory received null recipient when pharmacy.getEmail() returns null (email column is nullable in the DB schema). This would throw IllegalArgumentException from the factory.
findings.resolution: Added null guard in NotificationFactory.createNotification() that throws IllegalArgumentException with a clear message. The service layer must null-check pharmacy email before calling the factory.
findings.lesson_learned: Validate inputs at factory boundary to provide clear error messages. The service caller must guard against null email in pharmacy data.

findings.description: PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO uses Boolean (boxed) not boolean (primitive) to allow @NotNull validation to distinguish 'not provided' from 'false'. Using primitive boolean would make null impossible to detect.
findings.resolution: Kept Boolean (boxed) as the field type. This is the correct approach for optional request body fields that must be present.
findings.lesson_learned: Always use boxed types (Boolean, Integer, etc.) for DTO fields that require @NotNull validation. Primitive types cannot be null and @NotNull has no effect on them.

recommendations_for_next_phase: P3-ServiceAgent: LoggingAdminPharmacyService must inject AdminPharmacyService (concrete class) not AdminPharmacyServiceI (interface) to avoid Spring circular bean dependency since LoggingAdminPharmacyService is @Primary.
P3-ServiceAgent: AdminDashboardService.getStats() must handle totalPrescriptions=0 to avoid division by zero in treatmentRatePercent calculation.
P3-ServiceAgent: AdminPharmacyService.updateStatus() must null-check pharmacy.getEmail() before calling NotificationFactory — per the finding in this phase.
P3-ServiceAgent: EntityNotFoundException should be from jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException or a custom exception class — pick one and use consistently across all services.
